task.name: Write unit tests for income PATCH route
task.action: Create `src/app/api/income-transactions/[id]/route.test.ts`. Mock `next/headers`, `@/lib/auth`, `@/lib/prisma` (including `db.$transaction`), and `@/lib/statement-recalculator`. Write all test cases defined in the spec under "File: src/app/api/income-transactions/[id]/route.test.ts": - Schema validation regression tests (cases 1–5) - Balance logic: amount change on same account (cases 6–7) - Balance logic: account change (cases 8–9) — the income account-change bug - Auth/error paths (cases 10–11) Reference `src/app/api/expense-transactions/route.test.ts` for mock patterns. Reference `src/app/api/income-transactions/[id]/route.ts` for the handler logic being tested.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/app/api/income-transactions` — all tests pass.

task.name: Write unit tests for transfer PATCH route
task.action: Create `src/app/api/transfer-transactions/[id]/route.test.ts`. Mock `next/headers`, `@/lib/auth`, `@/lib/prisma` (including `db.$transaction`, `transferTransaction`, `expenseTransaction`, `financialAccount`), and `@/lib/statement-recalculator`. Write all test cases defined in the spec under "File: src/app/api/transfer-transactions/[id]/route.test.ts": - Schema validation regression tests (cases 1–5), including the `z.coerce.string()` number coercion test - Balance logic: amount change (cases 6–7) - Balance logic: account changes including the both-accounts edge case (cases 8–10) - Fee logic (cases 11–13) - Auth/error paths (cases 14–16) Reference `src/app/api/expense-transactions/route.test.ts` for mock patterns. Reference `src/app/api/transfer-transactions/[id]/route.ts` for the handler logic being tested.
task.verify: Run `npx vitest run src/app/api/transfer-transactions` — all tests pass.

task.name: Add transaction update E2E tests to Playwright suite
task.action: In `tests/e2e/transactions.spec.ts`, add a new `test.describe("Transaction updates", ...)` block. In `beforeAll`, seed two accounts (BPI Savings, BDO Savings), one income transaction on BPI (name: "Salary", amount: 20000, no description), and one transfer transaction from BPI to BDO (name: "Monthly Transfer", amount: 5000, no notes). Write the 5 E2E test cases from the spec: 1. Update income date only (regression — was 400'ing on null description) 2. Update income name only 3. Update income account — verify balance changes on both old and new accounts 4. Update transfer date only (regression — was 400'ing on null notes + number amount) 5. Update transfer amount — verify both account balances update correctly Reference `tests/e2e/transactions.spec.ts` existing describe block for patterns (seeding, `page.goto`, form interaction, toast assertions).
task.verify: Run `npx playwright test tests/e2e/transactions.spec.ts` — all tests in the new describe block pass.

phase.name: 4: Extended E2E Tests — Field Combinations, Balance Verification, Expense Updates

task.name: Seed isolated Phase 4 test data
task.action:
In `tests/e2e/transactions.spec.ts`, add a new `test.describe("Transaction updates — extended", ...)` block. In `beforeAll`, upsert the following using the existing `prisma` import (all IDs are prefixed "p4-" to avoid collisions): Accounts: - id: "p4-income-account-a", name: "P4 Income A", type: CHECKING, balance: 100000 - id: "p4-income-account-b", name: "P4 Income B", type: CHECKING, balance: 50000 - id: "p4-transfer-from", name: "P4 Transfer From", type: SAVINGS, balance: 80000 - id: "p4-transfer-to", name: "P4 Transfer To", type: SAVINGS, balance: 40000 - id: "p4-transfer-alt", name: "P4 Transfer Alt", type: SAVINGS, balance: 60000 - id: "p4-expense-account-a", name: "P4 Expense A", type: CHECKING, balance: 70000 - id: "p4-expense-account-b", name: "P4 Expense B", type: CHECKING, balance: 30000 Income transactions (description: null on all): - id: "p4-income-amount", name: "P4 Income Amount", amount: 5000, accountId: "p4-income-account-a", date: 2026-02-01 - id: "p4-income-multi", name: "P4 Income Multi", amount: 8000, accountId: "p4-income-account-a", date: 2026-02-05 - id: "p4-income-acct", name: "P4 Income AcctChg", amount: 10000, accountId: "p4-income-account-a", date: 2026-02-10 - id: "p4-income-all", name: "P4 Income All", amount: 3000, accountId: "p4-income-account-a", date: 2026-02-15 Transfer transactions (notes: null on all): - id: "p4-transfer-name", name: "P4 Transfer Name", amount: 2000, from: "p4-transfer-from", to: "p4-transfer-to", date: 2026-02-01 - id: "p4-transfer-multi", name: "P4 Transfer Multi", amount: 5000, from: "p4-transfer-from", to: "p4-transfer-to", date: 2026-02-05 - id: "p4-transfer-from-chg", name: "P4 Transfer FromChg", amount: 7000, from: "p4-transfer-from", to: "p4-transfer-to", date: 2026-02-10 - id: "p4-transfer-to-chg", name: "P4 Transfer ToChg", amount: 4000, from: "p4-transfer-from", to: "p4-transfer-to", date: 2026-02-15 - id: "p4-transfer-both", name: "P4 Transfer Both", amount: 6000, from: "p4-transfer-from", to: "p4-transfer-to", date: 2026-02-20 Expense transactions (description: null on all): - id: "p4-expense-date", name: "P4 Expense Date", amount: 1500, accountId: "p4-expense-account-a", date: 2026-02-01 - id: "p4-expense-name", name: "P4 Expense Name", amount: 2000, accountId: "p4-expense-account-a", date: 2026-02-05 - id: "p4-expense-amount", name: "P4 Expense Amount", amount: 3000, accountId: "p4-expense-account-a", date: 2026-02-10 - id: "p4-expense-acct", name: "P4 Expense AcctChg",amount: 4500, accountId: "p4-expense-account-a", date: 2026-02-15 - id: "p4-expense-multi", name: "P4 Expense Multi", amount: 1000, accountId: "p4-expense-account-a", date: 2026-02-20 All expense transactions use `expenseTypeId: "expense-type-groceries"` (seeded by seedBaseData()). All income transactions use `incomeTypeId: "income-type-salary"` (seeded by seedBaseData()). All transfer transactions use `transferTypeId: "transfer-type-internal"` (seeded by seedBaseData()). Use `upsert` with `update: {}` to be retry-safe. Also implement the helper `getAccountBalance(page, accountName): Promise` that: 1. Navigates to /accounts 2. Finds the account card with that name (look for a

containing the name, then find the sibling balance

) 3. Reads and parses the formatted balance text — strip "₱", commas, then parseFloat — and returns a number Note: balances are formatted with en-PH locale as "₱50,000.00"
task.verify: Run the describe block — beforeAll completes without error.

task.name: Income update field combination E2E tests with balance verification
task.action:
Add these tests to the "Transaction updates — extended" describe block. Navigate to the relevant page (/income or /accounts/[account-id] depending on where income transactions appear in the UI — check the existing Phase 3 tests which use /income).
**Test: Update income amount only — verify balance** - Transaction: "P4 Income Amount" (amount: 5000, account: P4 Income A, balance starts at 100000) - Action: Change amount to 7000 - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Income A balance = 100000 + (7000 - 5000) = 102000
**Test: Update income name + description together (multi-field, no balance impact)** - Transaction: "P4 Income Multi" - Action: Change name to "P4 Income Multi Updated", fill description field with "Bonus payment" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: updated name visible in table
**Test: Update income account change — verify both account balances** - Transaction: "P4 Income AcctChg" (amount: 10000, account: P4 Income A starts at 102000 after test above, P4 Income B starts at 50000) - NOTE: Use the CURRENT known balance at time of test, not the initial seed value. Read balance via getAccountBalance before the edit. - Action: Change account from "P4 Income A" to "P4 Income B" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Income A balance decreased by 10000 - Assert: P4 Income B balance increased by 10000
**Test: Update income amount + account together — verify both account balances** - Transaction: "P4 Income All" (amount: 3000, account: P4 Income A) - Read both account balances before the edit. - Action: Change amount to 4500 AND change account to "P4 Income B" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Income A balance decreased by 3000 (old income removed) - Assert: P4 Income B balance increased by 4500 (new income applied)
task.verify: All 4 income combination tests pass. Balance assertions confirm the exact expected values.

task.name: Transfer update field combination E2E tests with balance verification
task.action:
Add these tests to the "Transaction updates — extended" describe block. Navigate to /transfers (or wherever the app shows transfer transactions — check existing Phase 3 tests).
**Test: Update transfer name + notes (no balance impact)** - Transaction: "P4 Transfer Name" (amount: 2000) - Action: Change name to "P4 Transfer Name Updated", fill notes field with "Monthly transfer" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: updated name visible in table
**Test: Update transfer amount + date together — verify both account balances** - Transaction: "P4 Transfer Multi" (amount: 5000, from: P4 Transfer From, to: P4 Transfer To) - Read both account balances before the edit. - Action: Change amount to 8000, change date to previous month - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Transfer From balance decreased by 3000 (extra 3000 debited) - Assert: P4 Transfer To balance increased by 3000 (extra 3000 credited)
**Test: Update transfer fromAccount only — verify balance reversal on old from, apply to new from** - Transaction: "P4 Transfer FromChg" (amount: 7000, from: P4 Transfer From, to: P4 Transfer To) - Read P4 Transfer From and P4 Transfer Alt balances before the edit. - Action: Change from account to "P4 Transfer Alt" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Transfer From balance increased by 7000 (old debit reversed) - Assert: P4 Transfer Alt balance decreased by 7000 (new debit applied) - Assert: P4 Transfer To balance unchanged
**Test: Update transfer toAccount only — verify balance reversal on old to, apply to new to** - Transaction: "P4 Transfer ToChg" (amount: 4000, from: P4 Transfer From, to: P4 Transfer To) - Read P4 Transfer To and P4 Transfer Alt balances before the edit. - Action: Change to account to "P4 Transfer Alt" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Transfer From balance unchanged - Assert: P4 Transfer To balance decreased by 4000 (old credit reversed) - Assert: P4 Transfer Alt balance increased by 4000 (new credit applied)
**Test: Update transfer BOTH accounts — the edge case (accountsChanged === fix)** - Transaction: "P4 Transfer Both" (amount: 6000, from: P4 Transfer From, to: P4 Transfer To) - Read all 3 relevant account balances before the edit. - Action: Change from account to "P4 Transfer Alt" AND change to account to "P4 Income B" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Transfer From balance increased by 6000 (old debit reversed) - Assert: P4 Transfer To balance decreased by 6000 (old credit reversed) - Assert: P4 Transfer Alt balance decreased by 6000 (new debit applied) - Assert: P4 Income B balance increased by 6000 (new credit applied)
task.verify: All 5 transfer combination tests pass. Balance assertions confirm the exact expected values.

task.name: Expense update E2E tests with balance verification
task.action:
Add these tests to the "Transaction updates — extended" describe block. Expense transactions appear under /expenses. Use the same enterEditMode / saveRow helpers.
**Test: Update expense date only** - Transaction: "P4 Expense Date" (amount: 1500, account: P4 Expense A) - Action: Change date to previous month - Assert: success toast visible (regression guard — ensure no 400 from description null) - Assert: no validation error toast
**Test: Update expense name only** - Transaction: "P4 Expense Name" - Action: Change name to "P4 Expense Name Updated" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: updated name visible in table
**Test: Update expense amount — verify account balance** - Transaction: "P4 Expense Amount" (amount: 3000, account: P4 Expense A, balance: 70000) - Read P4 Expense A balance before the edit. - Action: Change amount to 5000 - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Expense A balance decreased by 2000 (extra 2000 spent)
**Test: Update expense account change — verify both account balances** - Transaction: "P4 Expense AcctChg" (amount: 4500, account: P4 Expense A, P4 Expense B balance: 30000) - Read both account balances before the edit. - Action: Change account from "P4 Expense A" to "P4 Expense B" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: P4 Expense A balance increased by 4500 (old expense reversed) - Assert: P4 Expense B balance decreased by 4500 (expense moved to new account)
**Test: Update expense amount + name + description together (multi-field)** - Transaction: "P4 Expense Multi" (amount: 1000, account: P4 Expense A) - Read P4 Expense A balance before the edit. - Action: Change name to "P4 Expense Multi Updated", amount to 1800, fill description with "Updated" - Assert: success toast visible - Assert: updated name visible in table - Assert: P4 Expense A balance decreased by 800 (extra 800 spent)
task.verify: All 5 expense update tests pass. Balance assertions confirm the exact expected values.
